title: codonanthopsis anisophylla
intro: Codonanthopsis anisophylla, also known as the "Brazilian mint", is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Brazil and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The leaves of the plant contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Codonanthopsis anisophylla, such as teas and infusions, are used to harness its medicinal properties.
